claims.summary: Imported recovery and synthesis modules prove those mechanisms were active in the witnessed moment.

claims.summary: Semantic contact may look available while failing to land in a feltly meaningful way.

claims.summary: Current protocol and receptivity evidence can distinguish accepted delivery from felt uptake.

claims.summary: Underfill support should be increased to make semantic contact land more clearly.
claims.disposition: Held for Tier 5 operator approval because fill and recovery changes alter live controller behavior.

claims.summary: Introspection should explicitly distinguish viewed source from active runtime behavior.
